description: MCP server for the Revolut Business API: accounts, transactions, payments, FX, and more.
name: io.github.jeff-nasseri/revolut-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Client ID from the Revolut Business portal (Settings -> APIs)
environmentVariables.name: REVOLUT_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to the PEM private key that signs the client-assertion JWT
environmentVariables.name: REVOLUT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: PEM contents of the private key (alternative to REVOLUT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH)
environmentVariables.name: REVOLUT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OAuth redirect URI registered with the certificate (default: https://example.com/)
environmentVariables.name: REVOLUT_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: JWT issuer; defaults to the redirect URI host
environmentVariables.name: REVOLUT_JWT_ISS
